items.name_en: Model: 666713. 💕MCM💕 Visetos Cylindrical Crossbody Bag. The geometric shape of this small crossbody bag is more exquisite against the backdrop of the classic Visetos pattern 🌹 and the gold-plated logo tag. The bag is made of 🇫🇷 French Nappa 🐂 leather and features a double-sided zipper closure. The fabric lining provides ample internal space to store your valuables. This cylindrical crossbody bag can be carried via the top leather handle or the included crossbody strap for increased portability. Strap length is 98 to 114. Dimensions: 16x16x14.

items.name_en: Model: CE331 Coach Baguette STUDIO BAGUETTE. 20cm bottom size, the perfect charming length, and the height is just right for essentials like a phone, lipstick, and keys. Equipped with 2 detachable shoulder straps, an underarm strap and a casual crossbody strap. Classic style, simple silhouette. Solid colors are basic colors, matching any outfit. A versatile all-purpose style.

items.name_en: Model: CH191 Coach HANNA Series. Full of sophistication and exquisite craftsmanship details! The side oil-edge pleated design gives the silhouette a soft yet structured look. The capacity is undeniable, continuing the large-capacity functionality of the traditional bucket bag. Two detachable shoulder straps, practical and versatile. The entire bag features Monogram PVC material, full of temperament. Magnetic closure, convenient and secure. Especially suitable for elegant ladies.

items.name_en: New Horn Bag
items.name_cn:
New Horn Bag
🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 Original Stock 2024 New Horn Bag AREN VISETOS HOBO Shoulder Bag
This Visetos Hobo bag features a design with a 🐂 adjustable leather shoulder strap and a leather tag with a lock 🔒. It offers a modern reinterpretation of a classic casual style, striking an ideal balance between softness and structure. This small-sized Aren Hobo shoulder bag incorporates design elements from traditional 🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 luggage, including a removable leather tag and an engraved logo lock, adding a finishing touch.
Material: PVC with cowhide
Color: White
Dimensions: 26x19x9.5cm

specs.rawTitle:
New Horn Bag
🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 Original Stock 2024 New Horn Bag AREN VISETOS HOBO Shoulder Bag
This Visetos Hobo bag features a design with a 🐂 adjustable leather shoulder strap and a leather tag with a lock 🔒. It offers a modern reinterpretation of a classic casual style, striking an ideal balance between softness and structure. This small-sized Aren Hobo shoulder bag incorporates design elements from traditional 🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 luggage, including a removable leather tag and an engraved logo lock, adding a finishing touch.
Material: PVC with cowhide
Color: White
Dimensions: 26x19x9.5cm

items.name_en: New Mini Essential Boston Bag
items.name_cn:
New Mini Essential Boston Bag
A fresh take on a classic silhouette. This Boston bag, paying homage to MCM's rooted travel philosophy, evokes the spirit of a weekend travel bag with clean lines and a convenient extended zipper for easy opening. Exquisitely crafted with meticulous attention to detail, the top handle is hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted. Size: 18x10x8cm

items.name_en: Style No.: CH194 Coach HANNA Series. Full of high-end feel and artisan details! Especially the side oil-edge pleated design gives the shape a gentle yet three-dimensional look. The capacity speaks for itself, continuing the traditional bucket bag's large capacity and functionality. Dual detachable shoulder straps, practical and versatile. Made of cowhide, full of temperament. Magnetic closure, convenient and secure. Especially suitable for elegant ladies.
